title: Un'infinità di disegni
subtitle: Master thesis in Communication Design
description:
In this work, I apply combinatorics to modular drawing by exploiting a typographic device. Starting from the work of Sébastien Truchet and Dominique Douat, I define a method of typographic composition in which counting, writing, and drawing are one and the same.

The project was selected to be exhibited in the group show “Neologia”, first in Turin (October 16–26, 2021 at Toolbox Coworking), and then in Milan (March 5–27, 2022 at Certosa Graphic Village, Milan).
details: In Neologia – Nuovi linguaggi del visual design in Italia (collective exhibition), Toolbox Coworking, Turin, Italy, October 16–26, 2021.
In Neologia – Nuovi linguaggi del visual design in Italia (collective exhibition), Certosa Graphic Village, Milan, Italy, March 5–27, 2022.
